# Translation editor — split view editing

> Generated from [`walkthroughs/bowrain-web-translation-editor.md`](https://github.com/neokapi/neokapi/blob/main/bowrain/web/docs/walkthroughs/bowrain-web-translation-editor.md). Do not edit by hand — change the prompt and regenerate.

Translator opens a project, navigates into a file, and uses the split-view editor to translate strings. Demonstrates source/target columns, save, and inline TM/term hints.

## Scene 1 — editor

<ThemedVideo
  sources={{
    light: "/video/bowrain/bowrain-web-translation-editor/01-editor.webm",
    dark: "/video/bowrain/bowrain-web-translation-editor/01-editor.webm",
  }}
/>

User opens the project detail view. The file drop zone renders, ready for translatable files to be uploaded. Once a file is added, clicking into it opens the split-view editor with source on the left, target on the right.

## Next

See the [getting-started walkthrough](/walkthroughs/bowrain-getting-started) for the broader workflow.
